current_scorecard.title: AI Math Tutor Ghana
current_scorecard.authors_full: Owen Henkel, Hannah Horne-Robinson, Nessie Kozhakhmetova, Amanda Lee
current_scorecard.setting_detail: Ghana, grades 3-8 (11 Rising Academies schools; 5 treatment, 6 control)

estimates.study_label: Henkel et al., Math growth score (endline - baseline, 3
estimates.treatment: Rori AI math tutor (2x30min/week for ~6 months)
